name: agrimap-agent-skills
description: Official cross-agent AgriMap engineering skill package
author: Billy (gasxhermvc)

scripts.test: npm run validate && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run verify:golden
scripts.test:unit: node --test tests/unit/cli-args.test.mjs tests/unit/extract-code-blocks.test.mjs tests/unit/fe-scenarios.test.mjs tests/unit/feature-lifecycle-policy.test.mjs tests/unit/qa-policy.test.mjs tests/unit/sql-artifacts.test.mjs tests/unit/sql-scenarios.test.mjs tests/unit/task-artifact-schema.test.mjs tests/unit/token-coverage.test.mjs tests/unit/verify-golden.test.mjs
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:workspace && npm run test:usage
